chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7653 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.33738/2019. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.03.2025 Mr. Salman J. Mirza, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Jawed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent 2. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, a notice has been assailed herein, however, the petitioner shall contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken there against. Counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
